Tests the addition of a custom property to the Function prototype and its verification.

# Purpose
This code snippet extends the `Function` prototype by adding a property named `indicator` with a value of `1`. It then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the `indicator` property on the `Function` object is equal to `1`. This code provides narrow functionality, specifically demonstrating how to add a custom property to the `Function` prototype and confirming its existence and value. The code is a short script that serves as a simple test or example of prototype modification in JavaScript.
